## BottomlessWater 3.4.4

Localization release — no code, config, or hook changes.

### Added
- German (`de`), French (`fr`), Portuguese (`pt`), and Simplified Chinese (`zh-CN`)
  translations. BottomlessWater now ships eight locales: `en`, `es`, `ru`, `la`,
  `zh-CN`, `de`, `fr`, `pt`. Colour tags and `/bw` command literals are preserved.

### Install / update
Drop `BottomlessWater.cs` into `oxide/plugins/` and run `oxide.reload BottomlessWater`.
Lang files are regenerated by Oxide on load; to use a bundled translation, copy the
matching `BottomlessWater-<locale>.json` into `oxide/lang/<locale>/BottomlessWater.json`.
